comment: Video gets both axes: pause on a frame, draw a box on it, and the note anchors to that spot at that moment.
The selector carries time and space together (t=… plus xywh=…), so the mark appears only while that frame is on screen.
_showoff: Mount internal; explains how the box knows when to show.
